text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 56 

CRDLGY_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Cardiology Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for cardiology services and electrocardiogram(s) 
provided during the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: CRDLGY 

LONG NAME: CRDLGY_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge
